input.prompt: Retail analytics war room with store heatmap overlays and theft-pressure zones. Isometric store floor plan, confidence bands, amber and cyan accents, dramatic noir data-visual style.

Bayesian decision theory diagram for loss prevention: threshold curve, ROI vs threshold frontier, false-positive cost vs theft cost tradeoff. Industrial amber/cyan palette, dark ops-room UI, minimal labels.
Industrial retail floor overlay with aisle pressure contours, camera cones, intervention markers, and threshold contour lines for a dark operations dashboard. No logos, no text blocks.
